text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #8)
Nothing different.  Exact same print-out as before, tried this:

[root@laser /usr/ports/devel/cmake]# CMAKE_VERBOSE=1
[root@laser /usr/ports/devel/cmake]# make

and this:

[root@laser /usr/ports/devel/cmake]# make CMAKE_VERBOSE=1
